summary: Iteration 5 testing complete - All NEW features tested and working: Hands-free voice mode (desktop FAB + mobile header button), Agent personality customization (agent_name + agent_personality fields in settings), [Voz] prefix conversations created by hands-free mode. Fixed backend bug where existing users' settings didn't return agent_name/agent_personality fields.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed GET /api/settings to return default agent_name and agent_personality for existing users who had settings created before these fields were added
HandsFreeMode component correctly creates conversations with [Voz] prefix
Settings panel has 'Identidade do Agente Principal' section with agent_name and agent_personality fields
Desktop FAB button (data-testid='desktop-handsfree-btn') visible on desktop, hidden on mobile
Mobile header button (data-testid='mobile-handsfree-btn') visible on mobile only
Web Speech API used for voice recognition - won't work in headless browser but UI elements verified
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - using existing admin user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 added hands-free voice mode and agent personality customization. Key test points: 1) GET /api/settings returns agent_name (default 'NovaClaw') and agent_personality (default '') fields. 2) PUT /api/settings updates agent_name and agent_personality. 3) Desktop has FAB button (data-testid='desktop-handsfree-btn') for hands-free mode. 4) Mobile has header button (data-testid='mobile-handsfree-btn'). 5) HandsFreeMode creates conversations with '[Voz] AgentName' title. 6) Settings panel has 'Identidade do Agente Principal' section with agent_name input and agent_personality textarea.

settings_all_fields.PUT /api/settings saves all fields: PASS - ollama_url, ollama_model, tts_enabled, tts_language, agent_name, agent_personality all saved

desktop_ui.settings_agent_identity_section: PASS - 'Identidade do Agente Principal' section visible

mobile_ui.mobile_handsfree_button: PASS - Headphones button in header (yellow background)
mobile_ui.handsfree_mode_from_mobile: PASS - Opens correctly from mobile header
mobile_ui.desktop_fab_hidden_on_mobile: PASS - FAB not visible on mobile viewport

bug_fixed.description: GET /api/settings was not returning agent_name and agent_personality fields for existing users whose settings were created before these fields were added
bug_fixed.fix: Added default value fallback in GET /api/settings endpoint: if 'agent_name' not in settings, set to 'NovaClaw'; if 'agent_personality' not in settings, set to ''

notes.web_speech_api: HandsFreeMode uses browser Web Speech API for voice recognition - this won't work in headless browser testing but UI elements were verified
notes.tts: Text-to-speech uses browser SpeechSynthesis API for reading responses
notes.conversation_title: Hands-free mode creates conversations with title format: '[Voz] {agentName}'
